card.name: Scoured Barrens
Feathered Acolyte
card.text: Flying, lifelink Devout — As long as you control three or more enchantments, this creature gets +1/+1.

card.name: Battlefront Scrounger
card.text: When this creature enters, create your choice of a Food or a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Streetwise Nomad
card.text: Nimble (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater.) Whenever this creature becomes tapped, scry 1.

card.name: Bolstered Veteran
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Horned Beligerent
card.text: Boast — {W}: This creature gains first strike until end of turn. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Blessings Mystic
card.text: Flying, ward {1} When this creature enters, create a Blessing token attached to another target permanent. (It's a colorless Aura token with, "Enchanted permanent has ward {1}.")

card.name: Undaunted Avenger
card.text: Boast — {1}: Untap this creature. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.) Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Sturdy Advancer
card.text: Vigilance Stampede 1 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.)

card.name: Courageous Rallier
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 1/1 blue Bird Cleric token with flying, and a 2/2 red Minotaur Warrior token. Stampede 1 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.)

card.name: Holy Holding
card.text: Enchant artifact or creature Enchanted permanent can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated.

card.name: Nomadic Defense
card.text: Destroy target tapped creature or creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Might-Wrought Boon
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has first strike.

card.name: Blessed Talon Sigil
Glorious Stampede
card.text: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. If you control three or more attacking creatures, instead creatures you control get +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Reckless Inventory
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a nonland permanent. Choose one. If the additional cost was paid, you may choose both instead. • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: Frontline Rejuvinator
card.text: Stampede 1 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.) When this creature enters, untap up to three target creatures.

card.name: Dusktouched Seeker
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, return target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand. Devout — As long as you control three or more enchantments, this creature has ward {2}. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: Dagger-Bite Stalker
card.text: Deathtouch Ferocious — At the beginning of your end step, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Blood-Bound Mercenaries
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 2/2 red Minotaur Warrior token. Boast — {4}: Up to two target attacking creatures get +2/+0 until end of turn. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Holy Site Watcher
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, scry 1.

card.name: Clever Swiper
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Bright-Eyed Adept
card.text: Vigilance, prowess {T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast noncreature spells.

card.name: Mind-Focused Warden
card.text: Guardian — Whenever you cast a creature spell with power less than this creature's power, draw a card if this is the first time this ability has resolved this turn. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Patient Trapper
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters the battlefield, tap target creature and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: Downpour Leviathan
card.text: Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.) When this creature attacks, surveil 2. If two cards were put into your graveyard this way, this creature can't be blocked until end of turn.

card.name: Shimmer Guard Blessing
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, draw a card. Devout — As long as you control three or more enchantments, this creature has prowess.

card.name: Rune-Carved Guardian
card.text: Defender Guardian — At the beginning of combat, if you control a creature with power less than this creature's power, this creature may attack as though it didn't have defender until end of turn.

card.name: Graceful Intervention
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If you control two enchantments, counter that spell unless its controller pays {4} instead.

card.name: Guardian Instinct
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if it targets a spell that targets you or a permanent you control. Counter target spell.

card.name: Jaw-Lock Glyph
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, tap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.

card.name: Wayfinder's Meditation
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a Cat. Scry 2, then draw 2 cards.

card.name: Marsh Sifting
card.text: Ferocious — Draw two cards. Then discard a card unless you control a creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Holy Gust
card.text: Return target creature to its owner's hand. Devout — If you control three or more enchantments, instead, put that creature on top of its owner's library.

card.name: River-Hunter's Cloak
Grove Warden Rager
card.text: Haste Guardian — When this creature enters, if you control a creature with power less than this creature's power, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature and draw a card.

card.name: Tusked Reinforcements
card.text: Create three 1/1 white Elephant Soldier creature tokens. They gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Night-Veiled Font
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card. At the beginning of your end step, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Marsh-Lurker Ambush
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. Then, that creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. If an opponent's creature would die this way, scry 4.

card.name: Ruin-Wander Watch
card.text: {1}{B}: This creature gets +1/+1 and deathtouch until end of turn.

card.name: Wound Wielder
card.text: Haste Boast — Pay 3 life: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Muck-Wield Stalker
card.text: Menace Ferocious — When this creature enters, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Night-Blessed Inquisitor
card.text: Flying, deathtouch Devout — As long as you control three or more enchantments, this creature has menace.

card.name: Strixan Siphon Priest
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Devout — If you control 3 or more enchantments, this creature gets +1/+0 and has lifelink.

card.name: Battlefield Finisher
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, destroy target creature that was dealt damage this turn.

card.name: Greedy Poacher
card.text: Ward—Discard a card. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player discards a card.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player may discard a card. If they don't, they lose 2 life.

card.name: Death-Wreathed Terror
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each nonland permanent in your graveyard. Whenever this creature becomes blocked, target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Horn Bore
card.text: Destroy target creature. If you control a Minotaur, target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Purge the Heresy
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. • Destroy target Aura with mana value 3 or less. • Remove up to two counters from target creature.

card.name: Death Roll
card.text: Ferocious — Destroy target creature if it has mana value 3 or less, or if you controlled a creature with power 4 or greater as you cast this spell.

card.name: Wander-Rite Offering
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a nonland permanent or discard a card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Call the Once Blessed
card.text: When this enchantment enters, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, target player loses 1 life.

card.name: Dark River Hiss
card.text: When this enchantment enters, target player discards two cards. Whenever a creature you control becomes blocked, target blocking creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. This ability only triggers once each turn.

card.name: Might-Marauder Helm
card.text: Equipped creature has menace and "Boast — {1}{B}, Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Target creature gains indestructible until end of turn." (Activate only if that creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.) Equip {1}

card.name: Marauder's Fee
card.text: Choose one — • This spell deals 3 damage to target creature. Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.") • Destroy target artifact or enchantment and create a Treasure token.

card.name: Nature Surge
card.text: Reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put any number of creature cards and land cards from among them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Night-Tuned Etchings
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {2}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Return target enchantment, instant, or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Night-Wind Spirits
card.text: Bestow {2}{U}{B} (If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.) Flying Enchanted creature has flying and gets +1/+1 for each color it shares with this enchantment.

card.name: Eager-Horn Rookie
card.text: Haste Boast — {1}{R}: This creature deals 1 damage to any target. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Front-Wander Scout
card.text: Prowess When this creature enters, target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Rune-Charged Striker
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Dauntless Recruits
card.text: Trample Stampede 1 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.)

card.name: Frenzy-Kin Reinforcer
card.text: When this creature enters, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Rune-Guard Sharpshooter
card.text: Reach Guardian — At the beginning of combat, if you control a creature with power less than this creature's power, this creature gets +1/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Battlefield Pilferer
card.text: Boast — {1}{R}: This creature gains menace until end of turn. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token or a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Rage-Legion Charger
card.text: Menace Stampede 2 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 2/2 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.)

card.name: Enraged Blast
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell you may sacrifice a nonland permanent Enraged Blast deals 2 damage to target creature. If a permanent was sacrificed, Enraged Blast deals 4 damage instead.

card.name: Cleanse with Fire
card.text: Cleanse With Fire deals 3 damage to target creature. Then if you controlled a Bear as you cast this spell, exile up to one target artifact or enchantment card from target opponent's graveyard.

card.name: Trample the Opposition
card.text: Choose one: • Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn. • Destroy target land. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Trade In
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. If an artifact card was discarded this way, draw three cards instead.

card.name: Claw-Striker Bracers
Distraction Strike
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 and first strike until end of turn. If you control a Cat, draw a card.

card.name: Unstoppable Force
card.text: Enchant creature When this enchantment enters, destroy target artifact. Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has trample.

card.name: Grove-Guard Sigils
card.text: Enchant land Enchanted land has, "{T}: Add {R}{G}{G} or {R}{R}{G}. Spend this Mana only to cast creature spells or activate abilities of creatures."

card.name: High-Eyed Spirits
card.text: Bestow {3}{R}{G} (If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.) Reach Enchanted creature has reach and gets +2/+2 for each color it shares with this enchantment.

card.name: Battle-Tithe Priest
card.text: Flying Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Vigor-Cloak Spirits
card.text: Bestow {2}{W}{B} (If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.) Lifelink Enchanted creature has lifelink and gets +1/+1 for each color it shares with this enchantment.

card.name: Bright-Tusk Recruit
card.text: When this creature enters, you may put a basic land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Protective Charger
card.text: Guardian — At the beginning of combat, if you control a creature with power less than this creature's power, this creature gets +1/+1 and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Far-Wander Shaman
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Brighthollow Guard
card.text: Reach Guardian — {3}{G}: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only if you control a creature with power less than this creature's power.

card.name: Marshland Hunter
card.text: Reach Ferocious — When this creature enters, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, this creature gets +0/+1 until end of turn and fights target creature you don't control..

card.name: Watchful Game Tracker
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, mill three cards. Put a land or creature card from among the milled cards into your hand.

card.name: Mighty Deserter
card.text: Flash Stampede 2 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 2/2 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.)

card.name: Surge-Seeker Wurm
card.text: Trample Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, you may draw a card.

card.name: Venemous Repurpose
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. Then, put a deathtouch counter on the creature you control.

card.name: Surge of Might
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature you control gets +2/+2. When this enchantment enters, enchanted creature gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Rally-Legion Requisition
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. If you didn't put a card into your hand this way, or if you control an Elephant, draw a card.

card.name: Stomper-Legion Hammer
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+2 and has stampede 1 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.) Equip {3}

card.name: Prepare an Ambush
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains hexproof until end of turn Ferocious — If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, put an additional +1/+1 counter on that creature.

card.name: Nurturing Nature
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. If you control three or more creatures, create a 2/2 green Bear Druid creature token.

card.name: Feline Instinct
card.text: Destroy target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying. If you control a Cat, gain 2 life.

card.name: Raid Lieutenant
card.text: Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token. This ability triggers only once once each turn.

card.name: Quick-Arm Spirits
card.text: Bestow {3}{R}{W} (If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.) Double strike Enchanted creature has first strike and gets +1/+1 for each color it shares with this enchantment.

card.name: Wilderness Cultivator
card.text: When this creature enters, if you control a creature with a counter on it, surveil 2. Then, you may put a land card from your graveyard into your hand.

card.name: Wild-Might Spirits
card.text: Bestow {4}{G}{U} (If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.) Trample Enchanted creature has trample and gets +2/+2 for each color it shares with this enchantment.

card.name: Solid-Hoof Veteran
card.text: Boast — {1}{W}: This creature gets +1/+2 until end of turn. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Elephon Frontliner
card.text: Whenever one or more tokens you control enter, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Blasphemer Detainer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, exile target creature an opponent controls until this creature leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Brightlight Paladin
card.text: Flying Devout — At the beginning of your end step, if you control three or more enchantments, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a creature with mana value 3 or less from among them and put it into your hand.

card.name: Great-Horn Knight
card.text: Double strike {1}{W}, Sacrifice an artifact: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Pride-Heart Lieutenant
card.text: Stampede 2, stampede 2 (Whenever this creature atracks, create two tapped and attacking 2/2 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter.)

card.name: Righteous Restoration
card.text: Return target creature or enchantment card with mana value 3 or less from the graveyard to the battlefield. Devout — When you cast this spell, if you control three or more enchantments, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Rallier's Boon
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has ward {2}. Whenever enchanted creature attacks, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Honorable Exile
card.text: Exile target creature. It's controller may create their choice of a Food token or a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.")

card.name: Great-Grove Guardian
card.text: First strike, reach Guardian — At the beginning of your upkeep, creatures you control with power less than this creature's power get +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Elder Wood-Warden
card.text: When this creature enters, put a shield counter on target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

card.name: Bright-Grove Watcher
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, you may return another target creature you control to its owner's hand.

card.name: River-Cloak Thief
card.text: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Ferocious — Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, draw a card.

card.name: Stream-Warden Guide
card.text: Vigilance Guardian — At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature with power less than this creature's power becomes unblockable until end of turn.

card.name: Dusk-Touched Pacifier
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, tap target creature. {2}{U}: Put a stun counter on target tapped creature.

card.name: Current-Wield Warden
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one target nonland permanent an opponent controls to its owner's hand.

card.name: Mind-Wander Acolyte
card.text: Devout — At the beginning of your end step, if you control three or more enchantments, create a 1/1 blue Spirit Illusion creature token with flying.

card.name: Enshrinement
card.text: Enchant nonland permanent Enchanted permanent is a colorless Shrine enchantment and loses all other card types and abilities.

card.name: Drowned Efforts
card.text: Counter target spell if it's a creature spell. Ferocious — If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, counter that spell instead.

card.name: Ursaeic Repurposing
card.text: Return target instant or sorcery from your graveyard to your hand. If you control a creature with power less than that spells mana value, scry 2.

card.name: Tanus' Observants
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create a token that's a copy of target noncreature enchantment you control.

card.name: Moonbound Prophet
card.text: Flying Devout — At the beginning of your end step, if you control three or more enchantments, draw a card.

card.name: Glorymarked Returner
card.text: This creature enters tapped. Whenever you activate a boast ability, you may pay {1}{B}. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Tithe Enforcer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, each player sacrifices a nontoken creature.

card.name: Fear-Tuned Mauler
card.text: Boast — {2}{B}, Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Creatures target opponent controls get -1/-1 until end of turn. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.) Whenever one or more creatures you control die or a card leave your graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Feared River-Lurker
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may cast a creature card from your graveyard. It enters with a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: Night-Feather Inquisitor
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Devout — When this creature enters, if you control three or more enchantments, instead target creature an opponent controls gets -13/-13 until end of turn.

card.name: Bog-Wander Poisoner
card.text: Deathtouch Ferocious — Whenever this creature attacks, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, put a -1/-1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Pull from the Bogs
card.text: Mill four cards, then return a creature card from among the milled cards to your hand. Ferocious — If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, instead, mill four cards, then return a creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Foul Tactics
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice two nonland permanents. Return up to two target creature cards from your graveyard to your hand. If you paid the additional cost, instead return those creatures to the battlefield.

card.name: Fell the Blasphemer
card.text: Devout — If you control three or more enchantments, this spell costs {1} less to cast. Destroy target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Serene Veteran
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may untap up to two permanents you control.

card.name: Core-Legion Wildguard
card.text: Vigilance Stampede 3 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 3/3 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.)

card.name: Wild Energy Apprentice
card.text: When this creature enters, you may exile a card from your graveyard. If you do, this creature deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker, where X is the mana value of that card.

card.name: Bovidian Barkeep
card.text: Whenever you activate a boast ability, you may pay {R}. If you do, discard a card, then draw a card.

card.name: Front-Legion Strategist
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, other attacking creatures get +1/+0 until end of turn. {1}{R}: Creatures you control gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Bold-Grove Elder
card.text: First strike Guardian — Whenever you cast a creature spell with power less than this creature's power, you may exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn you may play that card.

card.name: Range-Legion Flanker
card.text: Haste, reach Stampede 2 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 2/2 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.)

card.name: Wander-Heart Mercenary
card.text: Boast — {1}{R}: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.) At the beginning of your end step, if you attacked with three or more creatures, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Forced Conscription
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains trample and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Fury of the Desperate
card.text: Fury of the Desperate deals 2 damage to each creature. When one or more creatures you control are dealt lethal damage this way, Fury of the Desperate deals an additional 1 damage to each creature.

card.name: Natural Pushback
card.text: Choose one or both — • Destroy target artifact. • Target creature you control gains your choice of menace or reach until end of turn

card.name: Leuric's Highwayman
card.text: Vigilance, menace Whenever you activate a boast ability, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Battleground Assailant
card.text: Boast — Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Creatures you control gain first strike until end of turn. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.) Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Target creature gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Elephon Vanguard
card.text: Stampede 2 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 2/2 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.) When this creature enters, if you control three or more other creatures, draw a card.

card.name: Marshland Trawler
card.text: When this creature enters, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Ferocious — If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, instead you may return that permanent to the battlefield.

card.name: Grovetown Mentor
card.text: Reach {2}: Distribute up to two +1/+1 counters among tapped creatures you control. Activate this ability only as a sorcery.

card.name: Equalizing Hunter
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment an opponent controls.

card.name: Might-Legion Champion
card.text: Trample, ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Stampede 3 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 3/3 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.)

card.name: Wild-Wander Shepherd
card.text: Vigilance Guardian — At the beginning of your end step, if you control a creature with power less than this creature's power, draw a card.

card.name: Chart the Game Trails
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card and put it into your hand. Ferocious — If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, instead, search your library for up to two basic land cards and put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other in your hand.

card.name: Fostered Might
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature with power 3 or less. Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Stampede of the Legion
card.text: Creatures you control get +3/+3 and gain your choice of trample, vigilance, or haste until end of turn.

card.name: Greathunt Champion
card.text: Ferocious — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, put a menace counter on target creature you control. Spells you cast with mana value 4 or greater cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Tenoc's Huntguard
card.text: Reach Whenever a creature dealt damage by this creature this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and scry 1.

card.name: Front-Legion Surveyor
card.text: Stampede 2 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 2/2 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.) When this creature enters, if an opponent controls more lands than you, you may search your library for a Plains card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Otherwise, gain 3 life.

card.name: Bishop of Persistence
card.text: Flying, vigilance When this creature enters, create a Blessing token attached to target permanent. (It's a colorless Aura token with, "Enchanted permanent has ward {1}.") {W}, Sacrifice two enchantments: Return this creature from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped with a +1/+1 counter on it. It's a Spirit in addition to its other types.

card.name: Stalwart Representative
card.text: Vigilance Boast — {2}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.) Whenever an opponent casts their second spell each turn, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Gracious Wanderer
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, return target permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped. Attacking creatures you control have first strike.

card.name: Might of Faith
card.text: Enchanted creatures you control get +1/+1 for each enchantment attached to that creature. If you would create one or more tokens, instead create those tokens plus a Blessing token attached to a permanent you control. (It's a colorless Aura token with, "Enchanted permanent has ward {1}.")

card.name: Twilight Cleansing
card.text: Choose one: • Exile all nonenchantment creatures. • Exile all nonenchanted creatures

card.name: The Paths of the Rivers
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Search your library for an Island, Swamp, or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield then shuffle. Draw a card for each creature card in your graveyard. Creatures you control can't be blocked until end of turn.

card.name: Sacred Shrine Mason
card.text: Devout — At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control three or more enchantments, draw a card. {1}{U}, {T}: Create a colorless Shrine enchantment artifact token with "{T}: Add {C}. Spend this mana only to cast enchantment, instant, or sorcery spells."

card.name: Riverbound Seer
card.text: Whenever one or more counters are put on creature you control, scry 2. {3}{U}: Draw X cards, where X is the number of different kinds of counters among permanents you control.

card.name: Mind-Honed Mentor
card.text: Guardian — {1}{U}, {T}: Draw a card. Activate this ability only if you control a creature with power less than this creature's power.

card.name: Pathbound Mystic
card.text: Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Beckon the Starlight Forms
card.text: Create X tokens that are copies of target creature you control and are enchantment Spirits in addition to their other types.

card.name: Channeling of Moonlight
card.text: Whenever you tap an enchanted creature you control, scry 2. Whenever you activate an ability of an enchanted creature you control, you may pay {1}. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Elephon Charger
card.text: Trample, haste When this creature enters, other creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Scaled Dusk-Blade
card.text: Deathtouch Ferocious — At the beginning of your end step, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, put a bounty counter on target creature an opponent controls. Whenever a creature with a bounty counter on it dies, draw a card and put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Priest of the Damned
card.text: Flying Devout — Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, if you control three or more enchantments, return that creature to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control with a finality counter. It's an enchantment and a Spirit in addition to its other types.

card.name: Ambitious Saboteur
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, each player mills a card. If a permanent card enters an opponents graveyard this way, that opponent loses 2 life. If an instant or sorcery card enters an opponent's graveyard this way, draw a card.

card.name: Lone-Wander Resurrector
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a bounty counter on target creature an opponent controls. Whenever a creature with a bounty counter on it dies, exile a card from your graveyard. You may cast creature cards exiled with this creature. They enter with a finality counter on them.

card.name: Twilight Reckoning
card.text: Destroy all creatures. If six or more creatures were put into a graveyard this way, return a creature from a graveyard to the battlefield under your control. It's a Spirit in addition to its other types.

card.name: Skills of the Shadowed
card.text: When this enchantment enters create two 2/2 black Crocodile Assassin creature tokens with deathtouch. At the beginning of your upkeep you may sacrifice a nonland permanent. If you do draw a card and put a deathtouch counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Shine-Horn Lieutenant
card.text: Vigilance, trample Stampede 1, stampede 1, stampede 1 (Whenever this creature attacks, create three tapped and attacking 1/1 white Elephant Soldier creature tokens with a stun counter.)

card.name: Blaze-Wield Bandit
card.text: First strike, haste Boast — {X}{X}{R}: This creature deals X damage to target creature an opponent controls. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Wildfire Tamer
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 red Elemental creature token. {1}{R}, Exile a card from your graveyard: This creature gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Rage-Legion Brute
card.text: Stampede 1 (Whenever this creature atracks, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 white Elephant Soldier creature token with a stun counter on it.) At the beginning of your second main phase, if you control two or more other Elephants, sacrifice this creature and add {R}.

card.name: Virtuous Vagabond
card.text: Haste, menace At the beginning of your upkeep, exile the top card of your library. You may cast that card until end of turn. If you cast a creature spell this way, it gains haste. If you cast a permanent this way, return it to your hand at the beginning of your end step.

card.name: Desperate Assault
card.text: Untap all creatures you control. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase. Attacking creatures get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Gold and Glory
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, choose one — • Create a Treasure token for each creature that attacked this turn. • Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature that attacked this turn.

card.name: First Dance of Twilight
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Each player may draw a card. You gain 2 life for each player that draws a card this way. You may discard a card. If you do, each other player discards a card and loses 2 life. Until end of turn, enchantments you control become 3/3 Spirit creatures in addition to their other types.

card.name: Grovebound Tender
card.text: Vigilance Guardian — At the beginning of your end step, if you control a creature with power less than this creature's power, gain 3 life.

card.name: Trumpeting Captain
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may put a vigilance, trample or reach counter on this creature if it doesn't already have a counter of that kind on it. Other creatures you control gain that ability until end of turn. At the beginning of your upkeep, if this creature has a vigilance, trample, and reach counter on it, remove all counters from it and draw a card.

card.name: Lurking Huntkeeper
card.text: Flash Trample When this creature enters, create a Food token. {1}{G}, Forage: Put three +1/+1 counters on this creature. Activate this ability only as a sorcery. (To forage, exile three cards from your graveyard or sacrifice a Food.)

card.name: Far-Wander Ranger
card.text: You may play an additional land on each of your turns. {1}{G}: This creature gets +1/+3 until end of turn.

card.name: Blessings of Strength
card.text: Nontoken creatures you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter on them. Remove three +1/+1 counters from among creatures you control: Add {G}{G}{G}.

card.name: Primal Summons
card.text: Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put any number of creature cards from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Rise of the Stampedes
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) As long as you control this saga, creatures cost {1} less to cast. Draw X cards, where X is the number of creatures you control. Creatures you control get +1/+1 for each creature you control until end of turn.

card.name: Bask in Glory
card.text: Until your next turn, you can't lose life, and creatures you control gain lifelink and indestructible.

card.name: Quirrellus, Prophet of the Phases
card.text: Flying You may look at the top card of your library at any time. You may cast enchantment spells from the top of your library. Devout — Whenever you cast an Aura spell, if you control three or more enchantments, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Phasebound Emergence
card.text: If a permanent entering the battlefield causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time. The first spell you cast on each of your turns may be cast without paying it's mana cost.

card.name: Rites of Twilight
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. Whenever one or more creature cards are put into your graveyard from the battlefield or your library, choose one: • You draw a card and lose 2 life. • Each opponent loses 2 life. • You gain 2 life.

card.name: Imperial Shadowhand
card.text: Deathtouch Other Assassins you control get +1/+1. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Might of the Elephon
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+2. When this enchantment enters, creatures you control gain vigilance until end of turn. If it's your second main phase, there is an additional combat phase after this phase, followed by an additional main phase.

card.name: Tactical Gamble
card.text: Discard your hand. Choose one — • Draw three cards. • Draw cards equal to the number of attacking creatures you control. • Draw cards equal to the amount of damage sources you control dealt to players this turn.

card.name: Tenoc, Huntcaller
card.text: Deathtouch Other Crocodiles you control have deathtouch. Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, if it was dealt damage by a creature you control this turn, you may draw a card.

card.name: Grovekeeper Monument
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may put a creature card with mana value less than or equal to the number of lands you control from your hand onto the battlefield. {1}{G}, {T}: Target land you control becomes an X/X Elemental creature until end of turn, where X is the number of lands you control.

card.name: Neurevin, Herald of the Legions
Mercenary Inquisitor
card.text: Menace Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Draw a card and gain 1 life. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Fanatical Heretic
card.text: Flying The first noncreature spell you cast on each of your turns costs {1} less to cast.

card.name: Siphon Technique
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Unyielding Resilience
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Naturalist Enhancements
card.text: Creatures you control with counters on them have vigilance and reach. {1}: Move a counter from target permanent you control to another target permanent you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Balance of Dusk and Dawn
card.text: Whenever another nonland permanent leaves the battlefield or a nonland permanent card leaves your graveyard, you may pay {1}. If you do, target opponent discards a card or loses 2 life.

card.name: Battleground Improviser
card.text: At the beginning of combat, you may sacrifice a noncreature permanent. If you do, target creature gains haste until end of turn. Whenever another creature you control attacks, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Wild-Legion Deserter
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}{G}. Until end of turn, you don't lose that mana as steps and phases end. {T}: Add {R}{G}.

card.name: Support of the Legion
card.text: Attacking creatures you control get +2/+1. {R}{W}, {T}: Populate. (Create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

card.name: Wildland Guardian
card.text: When this creature enters, distribute three +1/+1 counters among up to three target creatures you control.

card.name: Emnian, Legion Commander
card.text: Elephants and Soldiers you control get +1/+1. Other nontoken creatures you control have haste. Whenever an Elephant or a Soldier enters the battlefield under your control, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Dusk-Veiled Professional
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever this creature deals damage to a player, that player may discard half their hand rounded up. If they don't, they lose half their life rounded down. (If they have no cards in hand, they cannot discard any cards.)

card.name: Ellevena, Rambunctious Heir
card.text: Vigilance, menace Boast abilities you activate cost {1} less to activate. Whenever you activate a boast ability, target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Wild-Surge Beckoner
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you may put a permanent card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Tanus, Eye of the Heavens
card.text: Flying If you would create one or more enchantment tokens, instead, you may create those tokens plus an additional token of the same type under your control. Whenever an enchantment you control leaves the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Duskrite Priest
card.text: Flying Whenever another creature dies or a creature card leaves your graveyard, create a Blessing token attached to target creature. (It's a colorless Aura token with, "enchanted creature has ward {1}.)

card.name: Cian, Earth Whisperer
card.text: Trample You may look at the top card of your library any time. Guardian — You may play lands and cast creature cards with power less than this creature's power from the top of your library.

card.name: Oremen, Wild-Keeper
card.text: Ferocious — Whenever Oremen attacks, if you control a creature with power 4 or greater, put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control, then draw a card. Whenever one or more creatures an opponent controls leave the battlefield, untap target land.

card.name: Garrison-Legion Quartermaster
card.text: Haste Equipped creatures you control get +1/+1. Equip abilities you activate cost {1} less to activate.

card.name: Clever Skywatcher
card.text: Reach Whenever one or more counters are put on this creature, draw a card.

card.name: Strixan Banner
card.text: {T}: Add {W}, {U}, or {B}. {W}{U}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Elephon Banner
card.text: {T}: Add {R}, {G}, or {W}. {R}{G}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Crocdilid Banner
card.text: {T}: Add {B}, {G}, or {U}. {B}{G}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Bovidian Banner
card.text: {T}: Add {R}, {W}, or {B}. {R}{W}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Ursaeic Banner
card.text: {T}: Add {G}, {U}, or {R}. {G}{U}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: The Might of Tanabon
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) As long as you control this saga, whenever you cast a creature spell, gain 1 life. Create two 2/2 white Elephant Soldier creature tokens. They gain haste until end of turn. Target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control.

card.name: The Trials of Saint Mornus
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Exile target creature you control. Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. Draw a card for each player that controls an enchantment. Return the exiled creature to the battlefield with a +1/+1 counter. It's an enchantment in addition to its other types.

card.name: The First Hunt of Roag
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Put a +1/+1 counter and your choice of a reach or deathtouch counter on target creature you control. Draw three cards, then discard two cards. Double the power and toughness of target creature you control until end of turn. It fights target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: The Tale of Ol Barrot
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Create a Weapon token and attach it to target creature you control. (It's an Equipment artifact with equip {2} and "Equipped creature gets +1/+1.) Whenever a creature you control enters this turn, it gains haste. Choose a creature you control. That creature deals damage equal to its power to each creature you don't control. Sacrifice the chosen creature.

card.name: The Teachings of Aodhan
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a Forest, Island, or Mountain card. Put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Creatures you control gain vigilance and menace until end of turn.

card.name: Felidian Guidestone
card.text: When this artifact enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top. If you control a Cat, put that card onto the battlefield tapped instead. {1}, {T}: Scry 1

card.name: Mighty Fort Town
card.text: As this land enters, you may behold two Elephants and/or Soldiers. If you don't, this land enters tapped. (You may choose two Elephants and/or Soldiers you control or reveal two Elephant and/or Soldier cards from your hand.) {T}: Add {R}, {G}, or {W}.

card.name: Bustling Monastery
card.text: As this land enters, you may behold two Birds and/or Clerics. If you don't, this land enters tapped. (You may choose two Birds and/or Clerics you control or reveal two Bird and/or Cleric cards from your hand.) {T}: Add {W}, {U}, or {B}.

card.name: Quaint Marsh Village
card.text: As this land enters, you may behold two Crocodiles and/or Rangers. If you don't, this land enters tapped. (You may choose two Crocodiles and/or Rangers you control or reveal two Crocodile and/or Ranger cards from your hand.) {T}: Add {B}, {G}, or {U}.

card.name: Bannerless Town
card.text: As this land enters, you may behold two Minotaurs and/or Warriors. If you don't, this land enters tapped. (You may choose two Minotaurs and/or Warriors you control or reveal two Minotaur and/or Warrior cards from your hand.) {T}: Add {R}, {W}, or {B}.

card.name: Woodland Hamlet
card.text: As this land enters, you may behold two Bears and/or Druids. If you don't, this land enters tapped. (You may choose two Bears and/or Druids you control or reveal two Bear and/or Druid cards from your hand.) {T}: Add {G}, {U}, or {R}

card.name: Elephon Representative
card.text: Elephant and Soldier spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever a token you control enters, you may pay {1}. If you do, create an additional token of the same type. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Strixan Representative
card.text: Flying Bird and Cleric spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. {1}, {T}: Create a Blessing token attached to target creature. Activate only as a sorcery. (It's a colorless Aura token with, "Enchanted permanent has ward {1}.")

card.name: Crocodilid Representative
card.text: Crocodile and Ranger spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you put one or more counters on a creature you control, you may put the same number of counters of the same types on another creature you control. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Bovidian Representative
card.text: Haste Minotaur and Warrior spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. {3}, Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Creatures you control gain your choice of vigilance or menace until end of turn.

card.name: Ursaeic Representative
card.text: Vigilance Bear and Druid spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. At the beginning of your end step, you may put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature you control that entered this turn.

card.name: Outskirts Inquisitor
card.text: Flying, vigilance Devout — At the beginning of your end step, if you control three or more enchantments, gain 3 life if this creature is untapped. Each opponent loses 3 life if this creature is tapped.

card.name: Twilight Reinforcer
card.text: Flying When this creature enters create a Blessing token attached to each of up to two target permanents. (They're colorless Aura tokens with, "Enchanted permanent has ward {1}.")

card.name: Decay Specialist
card.text: Whenever one or more cards are put into your graveyard from anywhere, gain 2 life and put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Marshland Witch
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, put a deathtouch counter on up to two target creatures you control.

card.name: Dusk-Blessed Brutalist
card.text: Flying, lifelink Boast — {1}{W}{B}{R}: Until end of turn, when this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player sacrifices a creature with the least power among creatures they control. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Bovidian Brutalist
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, target opponent sacrifices a creature, discards a card, or loses 3 life. Then, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Rallying Turncoat
card.text: Haste Whenever you cast a creature spell other than your first creature spell that turn, create a 2/2 green Bear Druid creature token.

card.name: Grizzled Rallier
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, if you cast it, untap up to three target lands you control.

card.name: Ade, Heir to Nothing
card.text: Other Cats and Nomads you control enter with your choice of a first strike, menace, vigilance, trample, or haste counter. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Exile the top five cards of your library. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature for each creature card exiled this way. You may cast cards exiled this way by paying 2 life in addition to their other costs.

card.name: Elefetik, Wary Watcher
card.text: [+1]: Scry 3. You gain 1 life for each card you put on the bottom of your library. If you put no cards on top of your library, create a 2/2 colorless Elemental creature token. [-3]: Exile target nonland permanent. [-8]: Exile all graveyards. You get an emblem with "Once each turn, you may cast a face-up exiled card without paying its mana cost."

card.name: Gifts of the Bayou
card.text: You may play lands and cast creature spells from your graveyard. If you cast a spell this way, that creature enters with a finality counter on it. Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, target player mills two cards.

card.name: Leuric, Glory Profiteer
card.text: Whenever you activate a boast ability, create a Treasure token. Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, create a Treasure token. Sacrifice a nonland permanent: Goad target creature. (Until your next turn, that creature attacks each combat if able and attacks a player other than you if able.)

card.name: Aoife, the Warden Mother
Tranquil Cove
Blossoming Sands
Rugged Highlands
Bloodfell Caves
Dismal Backwater
Swiftwater Cliffs
Jungle Hollow
Wind-scarred Crag
Thornwood Falls
Weapon FRT
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {2}

card.name: Bloodboiling Retribution
card.text: When this enchantment enters, you may destroy up to one target creature. Whenever a creature you control dies, untap target creature you control. It gains +2/+0 and first strike until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Rhythms of the World
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this enchantment deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker. Whenever a creature you control enters, draw a card. Landfall — Whenever a land enters under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures you control.

card.name: Ways of the Wanderers
card.text: When this enchantment enters, draw a card for each color among other permanents you control. Whenever you tap a land with one or more basic land types for mana, target creature you control gains landwalk of each of those types until end of turn.

card.name: The Path of Promise
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Put a menace counter on up to three creatures you control. Until end of turn, you may activate boast abilities as though they haven't been activated unless that ability has been activated two or more times this turn. Distribute X +1/+1 counters among creatures you control where X equals the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: The Wild's First Whisper
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Distribute X +1/+1 counters among creatures and lands you control, where X is the number of lands you control. Put up to two land cards from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. Draw cards equal to half the number of lands you control rounded up.

card.name: Mighty Strike
card.text: Deal 5 damage to any target creature. If that creature would die this turn exile it instead. Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control deals damage to an opponent, gain 1 life.

card.name: Blessings of Moon and Star
card.text: Creatures can't attack you unless their controller pays {2} for each of those creatures. {1}{W}, Sacrifice this enchantment: You may exile each creature you control. Return those creature to the battlefield tapped under their owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Riverbound Surge
card.text: Creatures you control get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Shared Earnings
card.text: Each player creates a Treasure token. Then, you create a treasure token for each creature that died under an opponent's control this turn.

card.name: Roar of the Wilds
card.text: Until your next turn, lands you control become 3/3 Elemental creatures in addition to their other types and gain vigilance, menace, haste, and indestructible.

card.name: Avia, Imperial Capital
The Book of Names
card.text: {3}, {T}: Draw a card and put a page counter on The Book of Names. {3}, {T}, Remove a page counter from The Book of Names: Reveal your hand. Search your library for a creature card that doesn't share a name with a creature you control, or a creature in your hand or graveyard, reveal it, put it in your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Weapon FRT
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {2}

card.name: Weapon FRT
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Equip {2}

card.name: Crocodile Assassin FRT
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Food FRT
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Treasure FRT
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Bird Cleric FRT
card.text: Flying

card.name: Clue FRT
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.

card.name: Shrine FRT
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Spend this mana only to cast enchantment, instant, or sorcery spells.

card.name: Spirit Illusion FRT
card.text: Flying

card.name: Elefetik, Wary Watcher FRT
card.text: Once each turn, you may cast a face-up exiled card without paying its mana cost.
